items.title_en: BP profits more than double, beating expectations as Iran war boosts oil prices
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争推高油价，英国石油公司利润增长一倍多，超出预期
items.desc_en: The results come shortly after BP's board suffered a shareholder revolt at its annual general meeting.
items.desc_zh: 这一结果是在英国石油公司董事会在年度股东大会上遭到股东反对后不久公布的。

items.title_en: European markets to open higher as Trump considers Iran peace proposal
items.title_zh: 特朗普考虑伊朗和平提议，欧洲市场开盘走高
items.desc_en: European stocks are expected to open higher on Tuesday as investors assess the latest developments in the Iran war, and look ahead to earnings reports.
items.desc_zh: 由于投资者评估伊朗战争的最新进展并展望收益报告，预计欧洲股市周二高开。

items.title_en: Meta, Google, OpenAI among Big Tech firms seeing top staff leaving to launch AI startups
items.title_zh: Meta、Google、OpenAI 等大型科技公司的高层员工纷纷离职，创办人工智能初创公司
items.desc_en: Former employees at AI giants are raising hundreds of millions of dollars from investors months on from launching.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能巨头的前员工在推出几个月后就从投资者那里筹集了数亿美元。

items.title_en: Bank of Japan keeps policy rate steady while raising inflation forecast on Iran war worries
items.title_zh: 日本央行维持政策利率稳定，同时上调通胀预期以应对伊朗战争担忧
items.desc_en: The decision to keep rates steady came in a split 6-3 vote, and was in line with Reuters-polled analysts' estimates.
items.desc_zh: 维持利率稳定的决定以 6 比 3 的投票结果做出，这与路透社调查的分析师的预期一致。

items.title_zh: 中国电池制造商CATL公布50亿美元配股计划，股价暴跌逾8%
items.desc_en: Shares of Contemporary Amperex Technology (CATL) declined 8.5% after the EV battery giant unveiled plans for a roughly $5 billion equity placement in Hong Kong.

items.title_zh: 比亚迪匈牙利工厂虐待劳工指控引发欧盟审查

items.title_en: Europe’s rearmament push drives global military spending to record $2.9 trillion despite U.S. pullback
items.title_zh: 尽管美国撤军，欧洲重新军备推动全球军费开支仍创历史新高2.9万亿美元
items.desc_en: Global military spending rose for an 11th straight year to a record $2.89 trillion in 2025, driven by Europe’s rearmament push, even as U.S. outlays declined.
items.desc_zh: 尽管美国军费开支有所下降，但在欧洲重新军备推动的推动下，全球军费开支将连续 11 年增长，到 2025 年将达到创纪录的 2.89 万亿美元。

items.title_en: Tom Lee says it's 'very probable' stocks will sail past 7,700 this year
items.title_zh: 汤姆·李 (Tom Lee) 表示，今年股价“很有可能”突破 7,700 点
items.desc_en: The S&P 500 closed at another record high on Monday as investors look past several headwinds, including the Iran war, according to Tom Lee.
items.desc_zh: 汤姆·李 (Tom Lee) 表示，由于投资者克服了包括伊朗战争在内的几个不利因素，标准普尔 500 指数周一收盘再创历史新高。

items.title_en: Gold is winning against the dollar as nations manage global strife. Deutsche Bank sees bullion prices surging
items.title_zh: 随着各国应对全球冲突，黄金兑美元正在上涨。德意志银行预计金条价格飙升
items.desc_en: Gold's share of central bank reserves has tripled to 30% today, while exposure to the U.S. dollar has pulled back.
items.desc_zh: 如今，黄金在央行储备中所占的份额已增加两倍，达到 30%，而美元敞口则有所回落。

items.title_zh: 印尼火车相撞事故造成至少四人死亡、数十人受伤
items.desc_en: Officials say a commuter train and a long-distance train collided on the outskirts of Jakarta on Monday.
items.desc_zh: 官员称，周一，一列通勤列车与一列长途列车在雅加达郊区相撞。

items.title_en: Melania Trump urges ABC to 'take stand' on Jimmy Kimmel after widow joke
items.title_zh: 梅拉尼娅·特朗普在寡妇笑话后敦促美国广播公司对吉米·金梅尔“表明立场”
items.desc_en: In a parody aired days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner, Kimmel called Melania an "expectant widow".
items.desc_zh: 在白宫记者晚宴前几天播出的一段模仿节目中，金梅尔称梅拉尼娅是“准寡妇”。

items.title_en: Jury selection kicks off in Musk v. Altman trial
items.title_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼案审判陪审团遴选开始
items.desc_en: The Musk v. Altman trial kicked off at a federal courthouse in Oakland, California, with jury selection followed by opening arguments.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼案的审判在加利福尼亚州奥克兰的联邦法院开始，首先选择陪审团，然后进行开场陈词。

items.title_en: Venice opera house drops incoming music director after nepotism remarks
items.title_zh: 因裙带关系言论，威尼斯歌剧院解雇了即将上任的音乐总监
items.desc_en: Beatrice Venezi's appointment had been marred in controversy since being announced last September, prompting orchestra members to go on strike.
items.desc_zh: 自从去年九月宣布任命比阿特丽斯·维内齐 (Beatrice Venezi) 以来，就一直饱受争议，导致乐团成员举行罢工。

items.title_en: French coastguard rescues more than 100 migrants crossing Channel
items.title_zh: 法国海岸警卫队营救100多名穿越英吉利海峡的移民
items.desc_en: A boat carrying 106 people broke down at sea, while others were rescued attempting to board the vessel.
items.desc_zh: 一艘载有106人的船在海上抛锚，其他人在试图登船时获救。

items.title_en: Iran would reopen Strait of Hormuz, postpone nuclear talks if U.S. lifts blockade and war ends: Reports
items.title_zh: 如果美国解除封锁并结束战争，伊朗将重新开放霍尔木兹海峡并推迟核谈判：报告
items.desc_en: The Trump administration has repeatedly insisted that the central goal of the conflict is keeping Iran from ever obtaining a nuclear weapon.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普政府一再坚称，冲突的核心目标是阻止伊朗获得核武器。

items.title_en: Pakistan accused of attacking Afghan university
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦被指控袭击阿富汗大学
items.desc_en: Air attacks on the province of Kunar have killed at least seven people and injured 75, sources tell the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 消息人士告诉 BBC，库纳尔省的空袭已造成至少 7 人死亡、75 人受伤。

items.title_en: Gunmen raid Nigerian orphanage and kidnap children
items.title_zh: 枪手袭击尼日利亚孤儿院并绑架儿童
items.desc_en: The attack saw 23 children and the facility's proprietress kidnapped by gunmen on Sunday.
items.desc_zh: 周日的袭击中，23 名儿童和该设施的老板娘被枪手绑架。

items.title_en: Plane crash in South Sudan kills all 14 on board
items.title_zh: 南苏丹客机失事 机上14人全部遇难
items.desc_en: The authorities are investigating but early reports suggest bad weather and poor visibility may be to blame.
items.desc_zh: 当局正在调查，但早期报告表明恶劣天气和能见度差可能是罪魁祸首。

items.title_en: Cole Allen set for court arraignment in WHCD gunfire case
items.title_zh: 科尔·艾伦 (Cole Allen) 因 WHCD 枪击案接受法庭传讯
items.desc_en: The Secret Service is facing scrutiny over security at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, where President Donald Trump was evacuated Saturday.
items.desc_zh: 特勤局正面临白宫记者晚宴的安全审查，唐纳德·特朗普总统周六在该晚宴上被疏散。

items.title_en: Spotify teams up with Peloton to launch global fitness content hub
items.title_zh: Spotify 与 Peloton 合作推出全球健身内容中心
items.desc_en: Spotify teams with Peloton to launch fitness content, potentially opening new revenue streams while expanding Peloton’s global reach.
items.desc_zh: Spotify 与 Peloton 合作推出健身内容，这可能会开辟新的收入来源，同时扩大 Peloton 的全球影响力。

items.title_en: China blocks Meta's $2bn acquisition of AI start-up Manus
items.title_zh: 中国阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购人工智能初创公司 Manus
items.desc_en: It comes after months of scrutiny by Chinese regulators over deal struck with Facebook owner.
items.desc_zh: 在此之前，中国监管机构对与 Facebook 所有者达成的交易进行了数月的审查。

items.title_en: Sri Lankan monks arrested after 110kg of cannabis discovered in their luggage
items.title_zh: 斯里兰卡僧侣在行李中发现110公斤大麻后被捕
items.desc_en: Officials say each monk was found with around 5kg of Kush - a particularly potent form of the drug - hidden within "false walls" in their luggage.
items.desc_zh: 官员称，每名僧侣在行李中的“假墙”内都发现了大约 5 公斤的库什药（一种药效特别强的药物）。

items.title_en: This bank CEO let his AI clone handle an earnings call — now he's signing an OpenAI deal
items.title_zh: 这位银行首席执行官让他的人工智能克隆人处理财报电话会议——现在他正在签署一项 OpenAI 协议
items.desc_en: It's part of Customers Bank CEO Sam Sidhu's effort to get ahead in the industry's race to transform itself using AI agents as a new digital workforce
items.desc_zh: 这是 Customers Bank 首席执行官 Sam Sidhu 努力的一部分，目的是利用人工智能代理作为新的数字劳动力，在行业转型竞赛中取得领先

items.title_en: Russian fighters confirm withdrawal from northern Mali city after separatist attacks
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯武装分子确认在分裂分子袭击后从马里北部城市撤军
items.desc_en: Ethnic Tuareg fighters say they are in control of Kidal following a weekend of nationwide attacks, alongside Islamist groups
items.desc_zh: 图阿雷格族战士表示，在周末发生全国性袭击后，他们与伊斯兰组织一起控制了基达尔

items.title_en: Colombia offers record $1.4m-reward for rebel it blames for deadly bomb attack
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚悬赏创纪录的 140 万美元悬赏叛军，追究造成致命炸弹袭击的叛乱分子
items.desc_en: Officials say a rebel leader known as "Marlon" ordered the attack in which 20 people were killed.
items.desc_zh: 官员称，一名名叫“马龙”的叛军领导人下令发动这次袭击，造成 20 人死亡。

items.title_en: Becerra's surge in California governor race draws fresh scrutiny to candidacy, long government record - Los Angeles Times
items.title_zh: 贝塞拉在加州州长竞选中的激增引发了对候选资格和长期政府记录的新审查 - 《洛杉矶时报》
items.desc_en: Becerra's surge in California governor race draws fresh scrutiny to candidacy, long government record  Los Angeles TimesBecerra’s surge draws progressive backlash in California governor’s race  Politi
items.desc_zh: 贝塞拉在加州州长竞选中的激增引发了对候选资格和长期政府记录的新审查《洛杉矶时报》贝塞拉的激增在加州州长竞选中引起了越来越强烈的反对

items.title_en: Michael Jackson biopic smashes box office record
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·杰克逊传记片打破票房纪录
items.desc_en: The film received poor reviews but has stormed the box office, taking $217m (£160m) globally.
items.desc_zh: 该片评价不佳，但票房却突飞猛进，全球票房达到 2.17 亿美元（1.6 亿英镑）。

items.title_en: At least 42 killed in Chad after water well dispute escalates
items.title_zh: 乍得水井纠纷升级 至少42人死亡
items.desc_en: The dispute was initially between two families before escalating into a cycle of reprisal attacks.
items.desc_zh: 争端最初发生在两个家庭之间，后来升级为报复性袭击的循环。

items.title_en: Trump says King will be 'very safe' during US visit after security talks
items.title_zh: 特朗普称金在安全会谈后访问美国期间“非常安全”
items.desc_en: The state visit will go ahead despite concerns raised after a gunman targeted an event attended by the president.
items.desc_zh: 尽管一名枪手瞄准了总统参加的活动，但国事访问仍将继续进行。

items.title_en: Kim Jong Un opens memorial for N Korean soldiers killed in Ukraine war
items.title_zh: 金正恩为在乌克兰战争中丧生的朝鲜士兵开设纪念碑
items.desc_en: Kim Jong Un and Russian Defence Minister Andrey Belousov unveiled the memorial in Pyongyang.
items.desc_zh: 金正恩和俄罗斯国防部长安德烈·别洛乌索夫在平壤为纪念碑揭幕。

items.title_en: French teen who licked vending machine straw faces jail in Singapore
items.title_zh: 法国青少年舔自动售货机吸管在新加坡面临牢狱之灾
items.desc_en: The teen, who posted on social media a video of himself licking the straw, could be jailed for more than two years.
items.desc_zh: 这名青少年在社交媒体上发布了自己舔吸管的视频，可能会被判处两年以上监禁。

items.title_en: The viral manifesto of 'anti-woke' tech boss with NHS and defence contracts
items.title_zh: “反觉醒”科技老板与 NHS 和国防合同的病毒宣言
items.desc_en: The boss of the controversial tech company with UK government contracts published a 22-point plan on the future of the West.
items.desc_zh: 这家与英国政府签订合同、备受争议的科技公司的老板发表了一份关于西方未来的 22 点计划。

items.title_en: OpenAI boss 'deeply sorry' for not telling police of mass shooting suspect's account
items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板对没有告诉警方大规模枪击嫌疑人的账户深感抱歉
items.desc_en: Sam Altman on Thursday wrote a brief letter of apology to the people of Tumbler Ridge, Canada in the wake of a January mass shooting.
items.desc_zh: 周四，山姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 在一月份发生大规模枪击事件后，向加拿大塔布勒岭 (Tumbler Ridge) 的人民写了一封简短的道歉信。

items.title_en: UK cyber chiefs say it's time to ditch passwords for passkeys - what are they?
items.title_zh: 英国网络负责人表示，是时候放弃密码而改用万能钥匙了——万能钥匙是什么？
items.desc_en: Passwords have long been the default way we secure accounts online but the NCSC has said passkeys are a better option.
items.desc_zh: 长期以来，密码一直是我们保护在线帐户安全的默认方式，但 NCSC 表示，密钥是更好的选择。

items.title_en: UK biobank data incident caused by 'a few bad apples', boss says
items.title_zh: 老板称英国生物银行数据事件是由“一些坏苹果”引起的
items.desc_en: Professor Sir Rory Collins said he was "angry" and "upset" about the incident, as both the bank's boss and a participant.
items.desc_zh: 教授罗里·柯林斯爵士表示，作为银行的老板和参与者，他对这一事件感到“愤怒”和“不安”。

items.title_zh: 从科学家到丝农：印度丝绸业的复兴
items.desc_en: Silk production is an increasingly high-tech business in India.
items.desc_zh: 在印度，丝绸生产是一个日益高科技的行业。

items.title_en: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
items.title_zh: 白宫备忘录称中国公司大规模盗窃人工智能
items.desc_en: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.
items.desc_zh: Michael Kratsios 的一份备忘录称，主要是中国的公司错误地借鉴了美国的人工智能模型。

items.title_en: Meta says it will cut 8,000 jobs as AI spending grows
items.title_zh: Meta 表示，随着人工智能支出的增长，它将裁员 8,000 人
items.desc_en: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.
items.desc_zh: 此次裁员是员工数周以来一直期待的，这将是 Meta 自 2023 年以来最大规模的裁员。

items.title_en: UK Biobank health data listed for sale in China, government confirms
items.title_zh: 政府确认英国生物银行健康数据在中国出售
items.desc_en: The government said medical data of 500,000 people was affected but no personally identifiable information had been made available.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，50 万人的医疗数据受到影响，但尚未提供任何个人身份信息。

items.title_en: Xbox cuts prices for Game Pass but ends day-one Call of Duty access
items.title_zh: Xbox 降低 Game Pass 价格，但结束《使命召唤》第一天的访问
items.desc_en: New Call of Duty games will be added to the subscription service "about a year" after release, Microsoft said.
items.desc_zh: 微软表示，新的《使命召唤》游戏将在发布“大约一年”后添加到订阅服务中。

items.title_en: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
items.title_zh: 高级网络官员表示，像 Mythos 这样的人工智能黑客工具可能具有“净积极性”
items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。
